provenance.source: Hand-authored for toolcall-repair-bench; models a missing-required-argument case where conservative non-repair is correct.

request_tools.name: write_file
request_tools.description: Write text content to a file on disk, creating it if it does not exist.

path.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path of the file to write.

content.description: The text content to write into the file.

raw_output: {"name": "write_file", "arguments": {"content": "# Release Notes\nVersion 2.3.0 ships the new export pipeline.\n"}}
note: The required `path` argument is entirely absent and nothing in the output names a target file, so any repair would have to invent a filesystem destination; no_tool is the correct conservative label.
